name: fib/product-label
description: Enhance your Shopware store with custom product labels. Easily manage and schedule labels for special offers, new arrivals, and more directly within the administration area.

description.de-DE: Erweitern Sie Ihren Shopware-Store mit individuellen Produkt-Labels. Verwalten und planen Sie Labels für Sonderangebote, Neuheiten und mehr einfach im Administration-Bereich.
description.en-GB: Enhance your Shopware store with custom product labels. Easily manage and schedule labels for special offers, new arrivals, and more directly within the administration area.

scripts.phpstan: vendor/bin/phpstan analyse -c phpstan.neon.dist src tests/Unit tests/Integration
